content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

October 23, 2002

James R. Sutton
Nielsen, Merksamser,
Parrinello, Mueller & Naylor, LLP
591 Redwood Highway, Suite 4000
Mill Valley, CA 94941-3039

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-179

Dear Mr. Sutton:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice relating to third-party post-election payments to your law firm, for post-election services rendered in connection with a ballot measure. I telephoned your office in September and left you a voice mail message indicating that we lacked sufficient information to issue a response, asking that you provide us with certain specific facts. As we have not received the required information, we are withdrawing your request for advice.

If you would still like written advice on these questions, you may send in another request containing the requested information. If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
